subcodes.first_line: O company like unto a candle! Praise be to the pure and holy God, Who hath accepted that household at His sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جمع چون شمع ستایش پاک یزدانرا که آن خاندانرا در عتبه مقدسه خویش قبول فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
